projects.title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive Power BI dashboard built to monitor sales performance, shipments, profitability, and year-over-year trends. The report uses Power Query, DAX, and a relational data model to deliver executive KPI reporting with dynamic filtering and time intelligence.
projects.imageAlt: Sales Analytics Dashboard overview showing sales KPIs, shipment trends, goals, and gross margin

projects.title: Paycor Workforce Reporting Integration
projects.description: Automated workforce reporting integrations that retrieve employee, labor, department, timecard, and payroll data and store it in MySQL databases hosted on Amazon RDS.

projects.title: Manufacturing Scheduler Control Center
projects.description: A centralized Streamlit platform supporting manufacturing scheduling, deployment validation, operational controls, conflict review, and missing-record analysis.

projects.title: Production Scheduling Automation
projects.description: Automated manufacturing scheduling and validation workflows to reduce manual effort, improve consistency, and support production planning.

projects.title: Customer Priority Dashboard
projects.description: A Power BI reporting solution that combines customer demand, open orders, inventory, and production data to help manufacturing teams prioritize work and improve operational visibility.

projects.title: TBE ERP Automation
projects.description: Multiple ERP API integrations supporting inventory, orders, shipments, scheduling, and operational reporting workflows.
